inputs.label: Target value
inputs.helper: Nominal or specification target.

inputs.label: Actual value
inputs.helper: Measured or observed value.

inputs.label: Tolerance
inputs.helper: Allowed tolerance band around target.

inputs.label: Batch value
inputs.helper: Production batch value at risk.

inputs.label: Rejection risk
inputs.helper: Expected rejection rate from drift exposure.

inputs.label: Analysis period length
inputs.helper: Number of calendar or working days covered by this analysis window.

inputs.label: Working days per year
inputs.helper: Operating days used to annualize period waste exposure.

inputs.label: Production units in period
inputs.helper: Good units produced inside the selected analysis period only — not annual volume.

inputs.label: Currency code
inputs.helper: All monetary inputs below must use this same currency for the analysis period.

inputs.label: Unit variable cost
inputs.helper: Fully loaded variable cost to produce one good unit.

inputs.label: Unit selling price
inputs.helper: Average selling price per good unit in the analysis period.

inputs.label: Gross margin percent
inputs.helper: Gross margin as a percent of selling price per unit.

inputs.label: Excess production units
inputs.helper: Units produced beyond confirmed demand inside the analysis period.

inputs.label: Excess inventory holding days
inputs.helper: Average days excess units remain in inventory before use or write-down.

inputs.label: Excess write-down per unit
inputs.helper: Value loss per excess unit — enter per-unit amount, not a lump-sum total.

inputs.label: Waiting minutes
inputs.helper: Queue, idle, or blocked minutes waiting for material, machine, or information.

inputs.label: Affected operators
inputs.helper: Operators idled during waiting events in the period.

inputs.label: Hourly labor cost
inputs.helper: Loaded labor cost per hour for waiting operators.

inputs.label: Affected machines
inputs.helper: Machines or lines idled during waiting events.

inputs.label: Hourly machine cost
inputs.helper: Loaded machine or line cost per hour during waiting.

inputs.label: Waiting opportunity mode
inputs.helper: Choose how waiting opportunity cost is excluded, entered manually, or derived from throughput.

inputs.label: Hourly opportunity cost
inputs.helper: Manual opportunity cost rate used when waitingOpportunityMode is manualHourly.

inputs.label: Planned units per hour
inputs.helper: Planned good-unit throughput used when opportunity cost is derived from throughput.

inputs.label: Transport distance
inputs.helper: Average one-way distance per internal transport move.

inputs.label: Transport trips
inputs.helper: Count of non-value internal transport moves in the period.

inputs.label: Transport cost per km
inputs.helper: Loaded vehicle or forklift cost per kilometer moved.

inputs.label: Handling minutes per trip
inputs.helper: Non-value handling minutes per transport trip.

inputs.label: Handling hourly labor cost
inputs.helper: Loaded labor cost for material handling during transport moves.

inputs.label: Transport damage rate
inputs.helper: Expected value loss from in-transit damage as a percent of average load value.

inputs.label: Average load value
inputs.helper: Average monetary value moved per transport trip.

inputs.label: Average excess inventory value
inputs.helper: Average value of inventory held above required buffer during the period.

inputs.label: Inventory holding rate
inputs.helper: Annualized carrying cost as a percent of inventory value.

inputs.label: Inventory obsolescence value
inputs.helper: Stock write-down from obsolescence — separate from excess production write-down per unit.

inputs.label: Inventory shrinkage rate
inputs.helper: Shrink or loss rate applied to average excess inventory value.

inputs.label: Unnecessary motion minutes
inputs.helper: Operator motion minutes that do not add customer value.

inputs.label: Motion affected operators
inputs.helper: Operators performing unnecessary motion during the period.

inputs.label: Motion hourly labor cost
inputs.helper: Loaded labor cost per hour for motion waste.

inputs.label: Overprocessing minutes
inputs.helper: Extra processing minutes beyond what the customer requires.

inputs.label: Overprocessing hourly resource cost
inputs.helper: Loaded machine or line cost per hour for overprocessing time.

inputs.label: Extra material cost
inputs.helper: Additional material consumed by overprocessing beyond standard BOM.

inputs.label: Extra energy cost
inputs.helper: Additional energy consumed by overprocessing steps.

inputs.label: Extra inspection cost
inputs.helper: Additional inspection or appraisal cost caused by overprocessing.

inputs.label: Scrap units
inputs.helper: Units scrapped inside the analysis period.

inputs.label: Scrap disposal cost per unit
inputs.helper: Disposal, sorting, or recycling cost per scrapped unit.

inputs.label: Rework minutes
inputs.helper: Labor and machine minutes spent on rework in the period.

inputs.label: Rework hourly labor cost
inputs.helper: Loaded labor cost per hour for rework activity.

inputs.label: Rework hourly machine cost
inputs.helper: Loaded machine cost per hour for rework activity.

inputs.label: Customer return cost
inputs.helper: Logistics, credit, or handling cost from customer returns linked to defects.

inputs.label: Warranty cost
inputs.helper: Warranty claims or service cost attributed to defect waste in the period.

inputs.label: Expedite cost
inputs.helper: Premium freight, overtime, or rush fees triggered by defect fallout.

inputs.label: Data confidence
inputs.helper: Your confidence that the entered waste drivers reflect actual shop-floor data.

inputs.label: Implementation difficulty
inputs.helper: How hard it is to implement fixes: 1 = easy kaizen, 5 = major capital or layout change.

inputs.label: Area
inputs.helper: Cultivated area in hectares.

inputs.label: Expected yield
inputs.helper: Target yield per hectare for the season.

inputs.label: Actual yield
inputs.helper: Observed or projected yield per hectare.

inputs.label: Price per ton
inputs.helper: Market or contract price per ton.

inputs.label: Irrigation cost
inputs.helper: Season irrigation energy and water spend.

inputs.label: Gross monthly salary
inputs.helper: Monthly gross pay used for screening.

inputs.label: Employer burden
inputs.helper: Payroll taxes and employer contributions.

inputs.label: Years of service
inputs.helper: Completed service years for severance screening.

inputs.label: Severance weeks per year
inputs.helper: Policy weeks credited per service year.

inputs.label: Notice weeks
inputs.helper: Notice period length in weeks.

inputs.label: Monthly repair revenue
inputs.helper: Total shop revenue for the period.

inputs.label: Comeback rate
inputs.helper: Comeback jobs as percent of revenue.

inputs.label: Average job cost
inputs.helper: Average internal cost per comeback job.

inputs.label: Diagnostic hours
inputs.helper: Unbilled diagnostic labor hours per month.

inputs.label: Labor rate
inputs.helper: Fully loaded technician rate.

inputs.label: Parts handling cost
inputs.helper: Core handling, returns and parts admin spend.

inputs.label: Parts cost
inputs.helper: Wholesale parts cost for the repair order.

inputs.label: Labor hours
inputs.helper: Book time or estimated labor hours.

inputs.label: Labor rate
inputs.helper: Shop labor rate charged to customer.

inputs.label: Shop supplies percent
inputs.helper: Shop supplies and consumables on parts subtotal.

inputs.label: Target margin rate
inputs.helper: Target gross margin on the quoted price.

inputs.label: Monthly repair revenue
inputs.helper: Total shop revenue for the period.

inputs.label: Comeback rate
inputs.helper: Comeback jobs as percent of revenue.

inputs.label: Average job cost
inputs.helper: Average internal cost per comeback job.

inputs.label: Diagnostic hours
inputs.helper: Unbilled diagnostic labor hours per month.

inputs.label: Labor rate
inputs.helper: Fully loaded technician rate.

inputs.label: Parts handling cost
inputs.helper: Core handling, returns and parts admin spend.

inputs.label: Driver RPM
inputs.helper: Motor or driver shaft speed.

inputs.label: Driver diameter
inputs.helper: Driver pulley pitch diameter.

inputs.label: Driven diameter
inputs.helper: Driven pulley pitch diameter.

inputs.label: Center distance
inputs.helper: Shaft center distance for open belt length.

inputs.label: Clamp force
inputs.helper: Target clamp or preload force for the joint.

inputs.label: Bolt diameter
inputs.helper: Nominal bolt diameter.

inputs.label: Friction factor
inputs.helper: Nut factor K for dry steel (typical 0.15–0.25).

inputs.label: Fixed cost
inputs.helper: Monthly fixed overhead for the period.

inputs.label: Unit price
inputs.helper: Average selling price per unit.

inputs.label: Variable cost per unit
inputs.helper: Direct variable cost per unit sold.

inputs.label: Current volume
inputs.helper: Units sold or produced in the period.

inputs.label: Target value
inputs.helper: Nominal or specification target.

inputs.label: Actual value
inputs.helper: Measured or observed value.

inputs.label: Tolerance
inputs.helper: Allowed tolerance band around target.

inputs.label: Batch value
inputs.helper: Production batch value at risk.

inputs.label: Rejection risk

inputs.label: Energy emissions

inputs.label: Fuel emissions
inputs.helper: Fuel and transport emissions tonnage.

inputs.label: Carbon price

inputs.label: Exposure percent

inputs.label: Certificate coverage
inputs.helper: Share of exposure covered by certificates.

inputs.label: Data completeness

inputs.label: CBAM certificate price
inputs.helper: Assumed certificate price per tonne.

inputs.label: EUR/TRY rate
inputs.helper: Exchange rate for local currency exposure.

inputs.label: EUR/TRY rate
inputs.helper: Exchange rate used to convert EUR exposure to TRY.

inputs.label: Product quantity
inputs.helper: Units in the shipment or production batch.

inputs.label: Admin cost

inputs.helper: Expected labor cost drift above budget.

inputs.label: Cost per 1k calls

inputs.label: Monthly revenue
inputs.helper: Product revenue for the same period.

inputs.label: Storage cost
inputs.helper: Monthly storage and egress spend.

inputs.label: Machine rate

inputs.label: Planned run hours

inputs.label: Callback visits
inputs.helper: Expected leak or warranty return visits.

inputs.label: Visit cost
inputs.helper: Average cost per callback visit.

inputs.label: Material run cost
inputs.helper: Extra fittings, pipe and supply runs.

inputs.label: Warranty reserve
inputs.helper: Warranty reserve as percent of job revenue.

inputs.label: Design pressure
inputs.helper: Internal design pressure for the vessel.

inputs.label: Inside diameter
inputs.helper: Nominal inside diameter of the shell.

inputs.label: Allowable stress
inputs.helper: Material allowable stress at design temperature.

inputs.label: Weld efficiency
inputs.helper: Joint efficiency factor E (typical 0.7–1.0).

inputs.label: Job revenue
inputs.helper: Quoted or invoiced revenue for the print job.

inputs.label: Material cost
inputs.helper: Substrate, ink and material spend.

inputs.label: Reprint rate
inputs.helper: Reprint and spoilage as percent of material cost.

inputs.label: Design revision hours
inputs.helper: Artwork and revision labor expected on the job.

inputs.label: Labor rate
inputs.helper: Fully loaded design and production labor rate.

inputs.label: Install rework cost
inputs.helper: Installation return and rework spend.

inputs.label: Revenue
inputs.helper: Customer or SKU revenue in the period.

inputs.label: Direct cost
inputs.helper: COGS and direct fulfillment cost.

inputs.label: Service cost
inputs.helper: Support, delivery rework and account service load.

inputs.label: Returns cost
inputs.helper: Returns, credits and rework tied to the account.

inputs.label: Material cost
inputs.helper: Raw material and purchased parts for the quote scope.

inputs.label: Labor cost
inputs.helper: Direct labor hours converted to cost for this job.

inputs.label: Machine cost
inputs.helper: Machine or spindle time allocated to the quote.

inputs.label: Energy cost
inputs.helper: Electricity, gas or utility load attributed to the job.

inputs.label: Overhead cost
inputs.helper: Allocated overhead such as rent, admin and indirect labor.

inputs.label: Waste rate
inputs.helper: Expected scrap or waste as a percent of direct cost stack.

inputs.label: Setup time cost
inputs.helper: Programming, tooling and first-off setup burden.

inputs.label: Shipping cost
inputs.helper: Freight, packaging and delivery cost for the quote.

inputs.label: Payment term cost
inputs.helper: Financing or delay cost from customer payment terms.

inputs.label: Target margin rate
inputs.helper: Target gross margin percent for the quoted price.

inputs.label: Discount rate
inputs.helper: Optional customer discount applied on the target sales price.

inputs.label: Tax included in costs
inputs.helper: Mark when entered costs already include sales tax or VAT.

inputs.label: Safety margin uplift
inputs.helper: Extra margin points added to build the minimum safe price floor.

inputs.label: Prevention cost
inputs.helper: Training, process control and prevention activities.

inputs.label: Appraisal cost
inputs.helper: Inspection, testing and audit cost.

inputs.label: Failure cost
inputs.helper: Scrap, rework, warranty and downtime from defects.

inputs.helper: Annual carrying cost as percent of inventory.

inputs.helper: Expected markdown as percent of inventory.

inputs.label: Monthly API calls
inputs.helper: Total API requests billed in the period.

inputs.label: Cost per 1k calls
inputs.helper: Blended cost per thousand API calls.

inputs.label: Monthly revenue
inputs.helper: Product revenue for the same period.

inputs.label: Compute cost

inputs.helper: Tear-off disposal and dump fees.

inputs.label: Warranty reserve
inputs.helper: Warranty and callback reserve for the job.

inputs.helper: One-way loaded distance.

inputs.helper: Fuel + wear per km all-in.

inputs.helper: Unpaid return miles as percent of loaded distance.
